summary: Workflow cache key does not include lockfile hash, so stale dependencies can leak between runs.

findings.title: Cache key omits lockfile digest
findings.rationale: Cache restore key only uses branch and OS, which may restore incompatible dependencies.
findings.recommendation: Include the lockfile hash in the primary cache key and keep broad restore keys as fallback only.

comment_markdown:
### CI/CD Review
- High-risk issue found in cache key strategy.
- Please update cache key composition before merge.
